case_title: SYNCHRONY BANK VS. MARGUERITE KUHN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: BRIEF SUMMARY OF THE CASE PURSUANT TO CRC RULE 3. 1800 (A) AND REIMBURSEMENT FOR COSTS CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 100078963) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT KUHN, MARGUERITE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-26-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK SERVED JUL-21-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KUHN, MARGUERITE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100094879): KAHN, MICHAEL D. SUBSTITUTED FOR VLACHOS, MICHAEL AS ATTORNEY FOR SYNCHRONY BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-29-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100078161) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT KUHN, MARGUERITE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUHN, MARGUERITE $1,927.64 PRINCIPAL, $351.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,279.54, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100078963)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100078963) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $351.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100078963) AS TO DEFENDANT KUHN, MARGUERITE
